texto: It’s strange how we tend to underestimate the power of small steps and think that they are not at all useful or effectual
autor: instead we use them as a pretext to freeze. Remember every step counts- even the longest journey begins with the first step. So go ahead take those baby steps and you never know they may bring about the much needed change your life…
